About

Engineered where complexity meets conviction.

Metadron Capital is a multi-asset quantitative investment platform that deploys capital across equities, ETFs, fixed income, and futures. Powered by the Metadron Cube — a proprietary signal architecture — we systematically detect structural mispricings, liquidity dislocations, and regime-driven inefficiencies that the market misprices again and again.


Our edge lies in the architecture — not intuition. We engineer conviction from signal, not narrative. Every position clears a four-gate gauntlet before a single dollar moves.

Vision

A quantitative framework for capital.

Markets are not efficient — they are fragmented, reflexive, and structurally mispriced. The edge belongs to architectures that read the entire surface while everyone else trades a single slice.

01
Conviction Over Consensus
We don't chase volume — we engineer conviction. Every position clears a four-gate gauntlet: flow, macro, fundamental, and technical. If any gate fails, the trade dies. No exceptions.
02
Structural Edge Extraction
Mean-reversion pairs, event-driven catalysts, distressed dislocations, and contagion cascades — scanned continuously across equities, ETFs, fixed income, and futures. When the regime shifts, the engine shifts faster.
03
Five Sleeves, Zero Ego
Five portfolio sleeves — directional equity, factor rotation, macro rates, options convexity, and volatility hedges — allocate capital dynamically. The regime decides the weighting. Not a committee.
The Metadron Cube

The engine behind every decision.

The Metadron Cube is where data becomes conviction. Five independent signal layers — liquidity, carry, credit, regime, and risk — collapse into a single score. If the score doesn't clear the threshold, nothing trades. Simple as that.

Strategy

Multi-asset, cross-market, relentless.

We hunt what others overlook. Five independent signal layers interrogate every corner of equities, ETFs, fixed income, and futures — cross-validating each other so only the highest-conviction dislocations survive to become positions.

01
Liquidity Plumbing
We follow the money before the money arrives. Fed balance sheet decomposition, dealer reserve routing, TGA flows, and collateral velocity — mapped in real time so we are positioned before the liquidity wave hits.
02
Carry vs. Volatility
Carry is only carry if you survive the vol. We normalise spreads across rates, credit, and futures against realised volatility — isolating the positions where you are genuinely paid to take risk, not just exposed to it.
03
Event-Driven & Dislocations
M&A arb, distressed credit, spinoffs, activist catalysts, and CVR mispricing — twelve event categories with quantitative models that identify the dislocation before the headline hits the tape.
04
Regime Intelligence
Trending, range, stress, or crash — the engine knows before you do. Gradient-boosted regime classification plus a 21-node contagion graph mapping banks, sectors, and macro assets. When dominoes start falling, we have already moved.
05
Execution & Kill Switch
Kelly-constrained sizing. Beta corridor guardrails. Hard drawdown gates. And a kill switch that triggers automatically when HY spreads blow out, VIX inverts, and breadth collapses — because the best trade in a crisis is the one you never made.
Live Trading Terminal — Dashboard View
Metadron Cube — Signal Architecture
The Intelligence Layer

Where quantitative intelligence meets cross-asset discipline.

Faster Than the Narrative
By the time the market has a story, we have already traded the signal. Our ML ensemble detects regime shifts and structural mispricings across equities, ETFs, fixed income, and futures — repositioning before the consensus forms.
Adaptive, Not Static
No static model survives contact with a live market. Signal weights shift dynamically as inefficiencies migrate — from credit dislocations to equity factor rotations to rates regime breaks — so capital is always where the edge is sharpest.
Every Dollar Has a Reason
Every position traces back to a specific inefficiency, a specific cube layer, and a specific portfolio sleeve. No black boxes. No hand-waving. If we cannot explain why a trade exists, it does not exist.
The Map Rewrites Itself
Yesterday's edge decays. Tomorrow's edge is forming. The Cube continuously recalibrates — learning which patterns persist, which dislocations are structural versus transient, and where the next mispricing is quietly assembling.

Structural inefficiencies are persistent, repeatable, and engineerable — but only for platforms architected to see the entire surface. The next decade of alpha belongs to those who stopped guessing and started engineering.

Leadership

Built by Practitioners, Powered by Machines for the Future

Wall Street pedigree. Quantitative DNA. Our leadership sat on the desks, ran the books, and learned one thing — the greatest source of alpha is the inefficiency that everyone else calls noise.

Ahmed Jamal

Prior experience at Morgan Stanley, Dodge & Cox, and Bank of America Merrill Lynch taught him that markets do not reward conviction — they reward engineered conviction. He built Metadron to prove it. Our People & Culture

Where quantitative edge meets
institutional discipline.

The smartest people on Wall Street still lose money to structure. At Metadron, we build the structure. Our team operates at the intersection of institutional finance and quantitative engineering — where the edge is manufactured, not discovered.

01
Practitioners Who Build
Everyone here has sat on a desk, managed real risk, and watched discretionary bias destroy alpha in real time. That scar tissue shapes everything we engineer.
02
Machines With Mentors
Our people do not compete with the engine — they train it. Human judgement sets the framework. The machine executes with a consistency and speed that no human can replicate. The combination is the edge.
03
Scaling the Edge
We are assembling quants who think in regimes, engineers who build for nanoseconds, and allocators who see signal where others see noise. One mission: scale the edge.
The Story

From trading desks to engineered alpha.

The Foundation
The desk.
Years on institutional desks at Dodge & Cox and Bank of America Merrill Lynch. The lesson was not about markets — it was about the people trading them. Discretionary bias, narrative addiction, and herd behaviour create structural inefficiencies that repeat across equities, fixed income, and futures like clockwork.
The Insight
Signal, not story.
The conviction crystallised: markets do not reward the smartest narrative — they reward the fastest, most disciplined extraction of mispricing. The future belongs to platforms that read the entire surface while everyone else reads the headline.
The Build
Engineering the Cube.
The Metadron Cube was built from scratch — five independent signal layers, regime-aware allocation, and a kill switch that values survival over performance. Purpose-built for the complexity that most platforms pretend does not exist.
The Mission
The mission.
Metadron Capital exists because fragmented markets continuously generate structural inefficiencies across equities, ETFs, fixed income, and futures — and because no one had built the platform to harvest them at scale. Until now.
Access

Ready to invest in engineered alpha?

For qualified investors who understand that the next generation of alpha will not come from better intuition — it will come from better infrastructure.
